jobs.title: Project Director - Infrastructure (Tier 1 Contractor)
requirements: Full accountability for ~AED 500M infrastructure programs - wet & dry utilities, drainage, power, telecom, civil works
P&L ownership, multidisciplinary team leadership across construction, commercial, planning, HSE
Degree in Civil Engineering; Tier 1 contractor experience; Dubai authority approvals familiarity
matchReasons: Direct wet utility & sewerage experience (USD 225M sewerage, USD 70M T&D) - exact domain match
CAPEX >1B AED exceeds AED 500M threshold
BE Civil + PMP + Chartered; L&T Tier 1 contractor background
HSE Champion with zero incident record; Primavera proficiency

coverLetter.body:
I am well versed in projects related to wet and dry utilities, drainage systems, sewerage infrastructure, and civil works, having delivered programs exceeding AED 1 billion in CAPEX across the GCC. Most recently as Civil Operations Head at Larsen & Toubro Ltd, Abu Dhabi, I led civil execution for substations, transmission lines and utilities infrastructure.

My experience directly aligns with your requirement for managing AED 500M infrastructure programs. At Galfar Engineering in Oman, I directed a USD 225M coastal sewerage network spanning 490 sq km with 11 vacuum pumping stations, a USD 70M transmission and distribution project, and multiple utility infrastructure packages - all requiring full P&L accountability and multidisciplinary team leadership across construction, commercial, planning and HSE functions.

With a BE in Civil Engineering, PMP certification, and Chartered Engineer status, coupled with my Tier 1 contractor background at L&T and extensive experience with Dubai and GCC authority approvals, I am confident I can deliver exceptional results for your infrastructure programs.
